mapper.select: SELECT qna_id, title, writer_id, writer, content, answered, created_at, updated_at FROM qna ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna (title, writer_id, writer, content, answered, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{writerId}, #{writer}, #{content}, #{answered}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE qna SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE qna_id = #{qnaId}
UPDATE qna SET answered = #{answered}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE qna_id = #{id}
